research_boundary: Research use only. Not for diagnosis, treatment, cure claims, prescribing, clinical deployment, regulatory compliance, or drug-safety certification.
stub_provenance_note: Stub canned hit for CACNA1C. Tetrahydroisoquinoline-like scaffold. Note hERG_IC50_uM = 8.9 uM is within cautionary range for multi-current assessment. ADMET from Chemprop v2 stub; pIC50 from Boltz-2 stub. Real values require Runpod GPU adapters.
